title: China's Industrial Sector Continues to Stall; Ongoing Recession in United States and Other Nations
section_path: China's Industrial Sector Continues to Stall; Ongoing Recession in United States and Other Nations
section_path_text: China's Industrial Sector Continues to Stall; Ongoing Recession in United States and Other Nations
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
China's manufacturing purchasing managers' index (PMI) fell to 48.8 in May, which has marked a second straight month of contraction. This weak PMI data is not surprising and is down slightly from the 49.2 contraction seen in April. Overall, it remains clear that China's industrial recovery has stalled in recent months.
